creator: mail_me@riseup.net
text:
Just checked upstream. There is official MPV backend support since November 16, 2014.

http://blog.smplayer.info/smplayer-with-support-for-mpv-is-now-available/

(...)
To use MPV instead of MPlayer, open the SMPlayer preferences dialog, and enter “mpv” instead of “mplayer” in the mplayer executable field.
